title: DonutTPA
description: A plugin to replicate the DonutSMP TPA system.
body:
![dtpa1](https://sqidgeon.github.io/gitcdn1/sqidgeonstudios/dtpa1.png)
[![discord](https://sqidgeon.github.io/gitcdn1/sqidgeonstudios/discord.png)](https://discord.gg/J2RRQcjHsM)
![dtpa2](https://sqidgeon.github.io/gitcdn1/sqidgeonstudios/dtpa.png)
DonutTPA

DonutTPA is a lightweight and easy-to-use teleport request plugin inspired by servers like DonutSMP. It allows players to send and accept teleport requests, making multiplayer survival more convenient without breaking the vanilla feel.

This plugin is designed to be simple, fast, and reliable, providing essential teleportation features without unnecessary complexity.

✨ Features
📩 Send teleport requests to other players using /tpa
✅ Accept requests with /tpaccept
❌ Deny requests with /tpdeny
⏱️ Optional cooldowns to prevent spam
🧼 Lightweight and optimized performance
🔧 Easy to configure and customize
🎮 How It Works

Players can send a teleport request to another player using a simple command. The receiving player can then choose to accept or deny the request. This system makes it easy to meet up with friends while still keeping gameplay balanced.

⚙️ Commands
/tpa <player> – Send a teleport request
/tpaccept – Accept a teleport request
/tpdeny – Deny a teleport request
🧩 Compatibility
Works with most modern Minecraft server versions
Compatible with popular server software such as Spigot, Paper, and Bukkit
🚀 Why Use DonutTPA?

Teleportation is a core feature in many multiplayer servers, but not all plugins keep things simple. DonutTPA focuses on delivering exactly what you need:

Clean functionality
No unnecessary features
Smooth player experience

Perfect for survival servers, SMPs, and small communities.

📦 Installation
Download the plugin file
Place it in your server’s /plugins folder
Restart your server
(Optional) Edit the config file to customize settings
📜 Permissions (optional)
donuttpa.use – Allows use of teleport commands
donuttpa.accept – Allows accepting requests
📌 Notes
Make sure your server is running a supported platform
Avoid using multiple TPA plugins at the same time
Configuration options may vary depending on version
📢 Support & Usage

If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out.

You are free to use this plugin on your server.
Do not reupload or redistribute without permission.
